WHY THIS IS DIFFERENT

Generic AI gives you a conversation.
This gives you a coach.

GENERIC AI CHAT MOCK
✗One question, one answer, one vague score at the end. You don't know what you got wrong or when.
✗Questions are made up on the fly. No way to know if they reflect what companies actually ask.
✗Feedback is the same regardless of whether you're targeting APM or Staff PM.
✗No structure. You might nail step 1 and completely miss step 4, and never find out.
✗Nothing tracks your history. Every session starts from zero.
VS
POCKET PM COACH
✓Feedback after every step. You know exactly where you lost points before moving to the next one.
✓1,200+ real questions sourced from actual company interviews, updated continuously as new reports come in.
✓Level-calibrated grading. L3 and L6 get different bars. The AI knows what your target company expects.
✓6-step guided structure that mirrors how top interviewers actually score your answer, section by section.
✓XP and session history so you can see your execution improving over time. Reps build consistency.
STEP-BY-STEP FEEDBACK

Know exactly where
you're losing points.

Most mocks give you a score when it's over. By then, you've forgotten what you said in step 2. Pocket PM Coach coaches you at every step while the context is fresh.

After each step you get: what you got right, what was missing, what an answer at your target level would have included, and a clear gap to close before the next drill.

No more walking out of a mock and not knowing if it was good.

STEP 3 OF 6: SEGMENTATION
STEP PROMPT
Who are the core user segments for Instagram, and which would you focus on to address a 15% DAU drop?
YOUR ANSWER
"I'd split users into creators and consumers. Creators make content, consumers watch it. I'd focus on consumers since there are more of them."
STEP FEEDBACK
GOOD
+10 XP
You correctly split creators and consumers. Missing: engagement depth within consumers (responders vs. lurkers) and creator frequency tiers, the segment likeliest driving the drop.
GAP TO CLOSE
At L5, name 3–4 segments, score each on size and relevance to the metric, and state which segment likely drove the drop with a hypothesis.
REAL QUESTIONS. ALWAYS FRESH.

Not made up.
Not recycled.

Our question bank has 1,200+ questions sourced from real company interview reports, tagged by company, difficulty, and module. It's updated on a rolling basis as new interview data comes in.

When you drill on a Meta Product Design question, it's a question Meta has actually asked. Not something an AI hallucinated because it sounded like a PM question.

Reps on real questions build real pattern recognition. That's the difference between feeling ready and being ready.

META HARD
Design a feature that helps Instagram reduce teen screen time without hurting daily active users.
GOOGLE MEDIUM
Daily active users for Google Maps dropped 8% in a specific region. Walk me through how you'd investigate.
STRIPE HARD
What is the north star metric for Stripe Payments and how would you measure ecosystem health around it?
NEW QUESTIONS ADDED CONTINUOUSLY

Three interview formats.

Build products people love to use.
